name: Sausage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the sausage until it crumbles. Drain and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine eggs, milk, mustard, salt, and pepper; beat for 2 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the sausage, breadcrumbs, and cheese.
4. Place half of the sausage mixture in a casserole dish.
5. Pour half of the egg mixture over the sausage.
6. Add the remaining sausage.
7. Add the remaining eggs.
8. Refrigerate overnight.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Serves 6.
